implementation_summary: Updated knowledge base search to use substring/contains matching across topic, title, and content by changing the search pattern from a trailing-wildcard prefix match to a wildcard-on-both-sides contains match. The change is localized to the knowledge service as requested.
commit_message: Fix knowledge search to match substrings in articles
validation_notes: No tests were added or executed as part of this file-only change request.
assumptions: The existing ORM/database backend supports SQLAlchemy `ilike` with `%...%` semantics for contains matching.
No additional query normalization or escaping is required beyond the current `query.strip()` behavior.
